basic_details.job_title: High Explosives Factory Khadki Tenure Based Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: High Explosives Factory Khadki has released the official Tenure Based Project Engineer Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced under the HEF Khadki Tenure Based Project Engineer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 30 years (with applicable relaxation for OBC-NCL and SC/ST candidates) and possessing B.E./B.Tech/Diploma in Chemical Engineering or B.Sc. with Chemistry as a major subject along with the prescribed apprenticeship qualification can apply offline on or before 21 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application form are

age_limit.age_details: Up to 30 years for General Candidates. Age relaxation for OBC-NCL (03 years) and SC/ST (05 years) is applicable.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years for General Candidates. Age relaxation is applicable for OBC-NCL (03 Years) and SC/ST (05 Years).

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech/Diploma in Chemical Engineering OR B.Sc Graduate with Chemistry as one of the major subjects. Apprenticeship in Chemical Trade as per Apprenticeship Act 1961 in Ordnance Factories under Munitions India Limited OR in Factories manufacturing/handling ammunitions & explosives OR in Factories other than manufacturing handling of ammunition & explosives.
qualification.details: Tenure Based Project Engineer (Chemical): B.E/B.Tech/Diploma in Chemical Engineering OR B.Sc Graduate with Chemistry as one of the major subjects. Apprenticeship in Chemical Trade as per Apprenticeship Act 1961 in Ordnance Factories under Munitions India Limited OR in Factories manufacturing/handling ammunitions & explosives OR in Factories other than manufacturing handling of ammunition & explosives.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 36000/- (1st Year) to Rs. 39338/- (4th Year) + Dearness Allowance as per prevailing rate
salary_details.details: 1st Year: Rs. 36000/- 2nd Year: Rs. 37080/- 3rd Year: Rs. 38192/- 4th Year: Rs. 39338/- + Dearness Allowance as per prevailing rate

selection_process: Selection based on Marks scored in B.E./B.Tech/Diploma/B.Sc and Personal Interaction/Interview. Merit list based on combined marks in B.E./B.Tech/Diploma/B.Sc and Personal Interaction/Interview (85% and 15% weightage respectively). Document Verification.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://munitionsindia.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the High Explosives Factory Khadki Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the High Explosives Factory Khadki Tenure Based Project Engineer posts is 21st June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Tenure Based Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Tenure Based Project Engineer (Chemical) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.E/B.Tech/Diploma in Chemical Engineering or a B.Sc degree with Chemistry as a major subject, along with relevant apprenticeship experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years for General candidates, with relaxations available for OBC-NCL and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Tenure Based Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 36,000/- in the first year to Rs. 39,338/- in the fourth year, plus applicable Dearness Allowance.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. How is the selection process conducted?
faq.answer: Selection is based on the marks obtained in the educational qualification and a personal interaction/interview, with specific weightages assigned to each.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the High Explosives Factory Khadki located?
faq.answer: The High Explosives Factory Khadki is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411003.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job, specifically for Tenure Based Project Engineers.
